human.name: Human
human.blurb: Baseline. The city was priced for you — which isn't the same as being built for you.

trait.name: Priced In
trait.blurb: The city was built for you. Transit is free and dealers quote you the real price — about 10% under sticker.

chassis.name: Self-Owned Chassis
chassis.blurb: Hardware holding its own title. Some bought themselves out; some just walked.

trait.name: Maintenance Cycle
trait.blurb: You don't sleep; you defragment. A full rest takes 4 hours instead of 8.

uplift.name: Uplift
uplift.blurb: Animal intelligence raised to speech in a corp lab. The paperwork says 'asset'; the law is still arguing.

trait.name: Escape Artist
trait.blurb: You got out of a lab; a fight is easier. Fleeing always succeeds (bosses still corner you) and you dodge a little better.

warform.name: Warform
warform.blurb: Vat-grown for a war that ended before the invoice cleared.

trait.name: Built For It
trait.blurb: The vat had specifications. +10% max HP, and guarding a telegraphed signature move cuts it to a quarter instead of a third.

hivemind.name: Hivemind Colony
hivemind.blurb: Many bodies, one opinion. On bad days, two.

trait.name: Shift Change
trait.blurb: Some of you is always rested. Actions cost 25% less energy.

avian.name: Feathered Avian
avian.blurb: Hollow bones, storm-sense, and a grip on every ledge the city keeps building.

trait.name: Rooftop Lines
trait.blurb: The city has a second street plan ten meters up. Walking anywhere takes half the time.

reptilian.name: Reptilian Cold-blood
reptilian.blurb: A patient metabolism in an impatient city. Sunlamps are a love language.

trait.name: Patient Metabolism
trait.blurb: Poisons and flames burn out before you do. Status effects on you last one turn less.

mycoid.name: Plant-Fungal Hybrid
mycoid.blurb: Photosynthesizes a little. Remembers everything the soil heard.

trait.name: Photosynthesis
trait.blurb: You snack on daylight. Waiting or exploring between 06:00 and 18:00 restores 5 energy instead of costing any.

luminal.name: Bioluminescent
luminal.blurb: Glows when feeling things. Poker is expensive.

trait.name: The Tell
trait.blurb: You glow when you feel things. Heartfelt dialogue lands harder (+1 affection) — and so do your offenses (−1 worse). Everyone can read you.

substrate_born.name: Substrate-Born
substrate_born.blurb: A signal that wanted a body. The city's basement dreams these, sometimes.

trait.name: Native Signal
trait.blurb: The basement dreams in your dialect. +15 heat capacity, and entering the Substrate costs half the energy.
